before: Title appears vested in Sam Seller, subject to source-document confirmation.
after: Title is vested of record in the parties identified in Schedule A; confirm marital/entity capacity against the vesting deed prior to closing.

before: The legal description was not reliably extracted.
after: The legal description is not present in the extraction; obtain a metes-and-bounds or platted description from the recorded vesting deed before closing.

before: The extracted chain of title includes 0 recorded instrument(s) requiring operator confirmation.
after: The chain of title is supported by recorded instruments; cite Deed Book and Page (and Instrument Number where present) for every link in the chain.

before: The source extraction identifies 0 open lien or encumbrance record(s).
after: Identify each open lien with creditor, debtor, original amount, recording Book and Page, and current status; treat unreleased records as open until proven otherwise.

before: The source extraction identifies 0 easement or restriction matter(s).
after: No easements or restrictions appear in the extraction; verify against the recorded plat and any declarations of record.

before: Schedule B-I includes 0 extracted closing requirement(s).
after: Schedule B-I requirements must list payoff, release, execution, and recordation steps and identify the responsible party (seller/buyer/lender).

before: Schedule B-II includes 0 extracted policy exception(s).
after: Schedule B-II must enumerate standard and special exceptions and note whether each is removable upon survey or affidavit.
Confirm no delinquent property taxes via current tax certificate.
